'''Sooma''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Grass/Legends|grassy]] plains and an [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]]-filled [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. It was [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] to the [[Sooman]]s.

The [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] were dispatched to Sooma as [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] couriers in the [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Around ten [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] defeat at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Sooma was attacked by the [[Stenax]] in the conflict known as the [[Stenax Massacres]].

==Behind the scenes==
Sooma first appeared in [[Droids (1986) 4|''Droids'' (1986) 4]], the fourth issue of the [[Star Wars: Droids (1986)|''Star Wars Droids'']] comic series published by [[Star Comics]], an imprint of [[Marvel Comics]],<ref name="Lost in Time" /> which was first published on [[October 1]], [[1986]].<ref name="The Destroyer publication date">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54154/star_wars_droids_1986_4|text=Star Wars: Droids (1986) #4}}</ref>
